title: Hiding boards' titles from items on Calendar view
excerpt: I would like to have the option to hide/show the board title, rather than having it always displayed next to the item name on the calendar view.

posts.author: Mohammed (Mohammed)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to have the option to hide/show the board title, rather than having it always displayed next to the item name on the calendar view.
